findings.evidence: `rg -n "/--|theorem symm" TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/OppositeRectangle.lean` shows docstrings only for `symm_symm` and `card_all_comm`; `symm_left`, `symm_right`, `symm_inj`, `symmEquiv_apply`, `symm_bottom`, `symm_top`, the four `symm_toGridRectangle_*` theorems, and the four corner-membership theorems have no docstrings.
findings.fix: Add short docstrings to the exported identity theorem groups, or make any purely internal helper lemmas private if they are not intended as public API.
findings.issue: The public side, equivalence-application, bottom/top, `toGridRectangle`, and corner identity theorems are undocumented even though the module docstring presents these identities as part of the exported bookkeeping API.

summary: The new module has a useful module docstring and documents the core definitions, but several public theorems advertised as part of the file’s API are left undocumented.
